description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, green roof and a wooden exterior. The structure features large, rectangular windows on both floors, allowing for ample natural light. There is a small balcony with a canopy on the upper floor and a covered patio area on the ground floor. The front yard includes a uniquely shaped swimming pool, a round outdoor table with an umbrella, and several palm trees, giving the property a tropical ambiance. Decorative plants line the base of the building, enhancing its curb appeal. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on outdoor leisure spaces.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat green roof, large windows, a balcony, a pool, and tropical landscaping.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, pool, patio, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, upper balcony, and more palm trees.
description_view_2: Left side view with the balcony and grouped windows visible, plus palm trees.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and decorative plants.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual large windows
